title: eleocharis khandwaensis
intro: Eleocharis khandwaensis, a species of sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eleocharis khandwaensis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and preventing infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, where it is mixed with other herbs to create remedies for treating fever, cough, and other respiratory issues.
